name: Fuuta Kajiyama
description:
he’s transmasc, and he’s secretive about it. / non-milgram, internalized transphobia be damned! his father is also mentioned in the scenario/personality for extra issues (since he’s canonically conservative).

I really tried my best with this bot since writing trans characters/characters as trans always makes my heart wrench and although im not trans, I relate really heavily! I hope I conveyed him & the struggles of being in a conservative society well.

update 10/31/25 yeah idk who i was fooling im trans LMAOOO
creator: HIBANARELOADED
